'''Sernpidalians''' were a [[near-Human]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hettitite]].<ref name="TEA" /> They had white hair, pale skin and red eyes, resembling [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Albino/Legends|albinos]]. The traditional Sernpidalian dress consisted of red-striped white robes with huge hoods. They were a deeply religious people, with one of their most revered deities being the goddess [[Tosi-karu]].<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> Most Sernpidalians were killed when the [[Praetorite Vong]] used the [[Yo'gand's Core]] tactic on Sernpidal, employing a large [[dovin basal]] to pull one of the planet's moons, [[Dobido]], against the globe.

{{Species-stub}}
